ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of recipient */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the recipient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the recipient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the recipient is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the recipient is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipient_types" (
  "recipient_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient type */,
  "recipient_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient type (e.g., Indian Tribe, State) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipient type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialists" (
  "specialist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialist */,
  "specialist_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialist */,
  "specialist_email" TEXT /* Email of the specialist */,
  "specialist_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the specialist */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the specialist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_officers" (
  "project_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project officer */,
  "project_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the project officer */,
  "project_officer_email" TEXT /* Email of the project officer */,
  "project_officer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project officer */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "division_offices" (
  "division_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division office */,
  "division_office_name" TEXT /* Name of the division office */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the division office is located */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the division office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the division office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the division office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the division office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the division office is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the division office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number assigned by the environmental agency */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the grant is awarded */,
  "aaship" TEXT /* AAShip (Area, Activity, Sub-activity, and Sub-sub-activity) code */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the grant */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "recipient_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of recipient */,
  "cumulative_award" TEXT /* Cumulative award amount for the grant */,
  "project_start" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "specialist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialist involved in the grant */,
  "project_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project officer responsible for the grant */,
  "division_office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division office managing the grant */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_recipient_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_type_id") REFERENCES recipient_types ("recipient_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_division_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_office_id") REFERENCES division_offices ("division_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_project_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_officer_id") REFERENCES project_officers ("project_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_specialist_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialist_id") REFERENCES specialists ("specialist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date of the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_expenditures_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Project report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'project_officer', 'recipient') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_grants" (
  "user_grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-grant association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_grants_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_grants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
